# terrible_community_general_slackpkg (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Name of package to install/remove.

### Optional

- `state` (String) State of the package, you can use `installed` as an alias for `present` and `removed` as one for `absent`.
- `update_cache` (Boolean) Update the package database first.
